name: Cheddar Cheese

pros.title: very strong calcium identity
pros.explanation: This is one of the cleanest reasons cheese still performs well inside dairy despite its drawbacks.

pros.title: protein density is strong
pros.explanation: Cheddar clearly still delivers on the protein side of dairy.

pros.title: very practical and versatile
pros.explanation: It is genuinely easy to use in lots of foods.

cons.title: saturated fat is a major drawback
cons.explanation: This is the biggest reason cheddar is not an easy elite dairy food.

cons.title: energy density is harsh
cons.explanation: Calories add up quickly compared with cleaner dairy anchors.

cons.title: easy to overeat
cons.explanation: Highly palatable and dense enough to add up fast.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
